def build_report(items: list[dict]) -> str:
    lines = [f"id={item['id']} name={item['name']}" for item in items]
    return "\n".join(lines) + "\n"


def concatenate_log_entries(entries: list[str]) -> str:
    return "\n".join(f"[LOG] {entry}" for entry in entries) + "\n"


def build_sql_values(rows: list[tuple]) -> str:
    parts = [f"({row[0]}, '{row[1]}')" for row in rows]
    return ",".join(parts)
